package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for request_dto_contains_gorm_tags: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Request DTOs that carry persistence-only `gorm` tags.
type CaseRequestDtoContainsGormTagsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRequestDtoContainsGormTagsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRequestDtoContainsGormTagsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRequestDtoContainsGormTagsModel
}

type CaseRequestDtoContainsGormTagsService struct {
    repo *CaseRequestDtoContainsGormTagsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRequestDtoContainsGormTagsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeRequestDtoContainsGormTags(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRequestDtoContainsGormTagsDTO) error {
    focus := "request_dto_contains_gorm_tags"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseRequestDtoContainsGormTagsRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    var model CaseRequestDtoContainsGormTagsModel
    if err := repo.db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", input).First(&model).Error; err != nil { return err }
    _, _ = repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT id, tenant_id, status FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", input)
    dto := CaseRequestDtoContainsGormTagsDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CaseRequestDtoContainsGormTagsModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    request_dto_contains_gorm_tags_negative := map[string]int{"request": 1, "dto": 2, "contains": 3, "gorm": 4, "tags": 5}
    request_dto_contains_gorm_tags_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    request_negative_0 := request_dto_contains_gorm_tags_negative["request"] + len(input)
    _ = request_negative_0
    dto_negative_1 := CaseRequestDtoContainsGormTagsDTO{ID: input, Status: "dto"}
    _ = dto_negative_1
    contains_negative_2 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = contains_negative_2
    gorm_negative_3 := db.Where("gorm_id = ?", input)
    _ = gorm_negative_3
    tags_negative_4 := request_dto_contains_gorm_tags_negative["tags"] + len(input)
    _ = tags_negative_4
    return nil
}
